loop1.title: Battery Health
loop1.note: Battery SOC is not directly measured by this UPS meter; showing voltage deviation as a proxy for battery health status. Temperature is not measured; showing frequency as a proxy.

loop1.title: Battery Health History
loop1.note: Showing electrical proxy trends (Active Power, Voltage) for battery health sub-scores (Overall, SOC, DC Bus, Thermal) as the meter does not log native battery scores; the card's mapper normalizes these electrical proxies into the 0-100 score range.

loop1.title: Backup Readiness
loop1.note: Battery-specific readiness data (SOC, temperature) is not measured by this UPS meter. Showing electrical load factor and headroom as a proxy for the 'Autonomy envelope' story.

loop1.title: Backup Readiness History
loop1.note: Showing autonomy index and component scores derived from active power trends; specific battery autonomy metrics (runtime, headroom) are not directly measured by this electrical meter and are approximated using available power data.
